{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Buzzing Remnant flies
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|There are buzzing [[Remnant]] flies in a tank.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
